name: AESignature Guard - A/E Multi-State License Compliance
concept: AI-powered multi-state license tracking for architecture and engineering firms. Prevents unlicensed staff from signing/stamping drawings, tracks license expiration across 50+ state boards, and manages NCARB/NCEES record compliance.
target_market: Architecture and Engineering firms with multi-state operations (5K firms)
business_model: B2B SaaS - Small firm $400/mo, Mid firm $1,200/mo, Large firm $3,000/mo + $5/professional/mo

practice_blocking_urgency.impact: Firm liability exposure, insurance void, potential license revocation, $10K-100K/day project delays

ai_advantage: Stamp authority verification: AI verifies stamp/seal authority before drawings are signed via CAD plugin
Multi-state license tracking: Monitors 50+ state boards for license status, expiration, disciplinary actions
NCARB/NCEES record sync: Auto-syncs with council records for reciprocity
Project license requirements: AI matches professional licenses to project state requirements
competitive_advantage: 50-state board license database with real-time status monitoring
primary_risks: State board data access limitations (no centralized API)
